text.value: Patient summary Document

tr.td: Clopidogrel (as clopidogrel bisulfate) 75 mg oral tablet
1 spray (400 micrograms) under the tongue as needed for chest pain, may repeat every 5 minutes as needed, up to 3 sprays in 15 minutes
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Streptococcus pneumoniae Danish serotype 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 8, 9V, 10A, 11A, 12F, 14, 15B, 18C, 19A, 19F, 22F, 23F, 33F capsular polysaccharide antigens conjugated only vaccine product
Streptococcus pneumoniae Danish serotype 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 9V, 14, 18C, 19A, 19F, 23F, capsular polysaccharide conjugated antigens only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product

ul.li: Patient will demonstrate understanding of lifestyle modifications to manage blood pressure, including diet, exercise, and medication adherence.
Patient will verbalize understanding of prediabetes and demonstrate ability to monitor blood glucose, follow dietary recommendations, and engage in regular physical activity.
Maintain or reduce HbA1c to below 5.7% to prevent progression to diabetes.
Patient will achieve a 5% reduction in body weight to improve metabolic parameters.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg as part of diabetes risk reduction.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Glucose [Mass/volume] in Urine by Test strip
Ketones [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Specific gravity of Urine by Test strip
pH of Urine by Test strip
Protein [Mass/volume] in Urine by Test strip
Nitrite [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Hemoglobin [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Leukocyte esterase [Presence] in Urine by Test strip
Leukocytes [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Erythrocytes [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Epithelial cells [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Casts [Presence] in Urine sediment by Light microscopy
Mucus [Presence] in Urine sediment by Light microscopy
Bacteria [#/area] in Urine sediment by Microscopy high power field
Bacteria identified in Urine by Culture

ul.li: Patient will demonstrate understanding of lifestyle modifications to manage blood pressure, including diet, exercise, and medication adherence.
Patient will verbalize understanding of prediabetes and demonstrate ability to monitor blood glucose, follow dietary recommendations, and engage in regular physical activity.
Maintain or reduce HbA1c to below 5.7% to prevent progression to diabetes.
Patient will achieve a 5% reduction in body weight to improve metabolic parameters.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg as part of diabetes risk reduction.
